title: AI Demo Showcase
subtitle: Explore the collection of AI demos. Click Watch to see them in action or Repo to view the source.

demos.title: AI Search with RAG summary
demos.description: Hybrid search pipeline combining BM25 keyword and vector search on Azure AI Search, with semantic reranking and GPT-4o streaming answer synthesis. Features a dark-theme SPA with animated result cards, semantic caption highlights, and real-time typewriter streaming.

demos.title: Document Intelligence Extractor
demos.description: Flask web app secured with Microsoft Entra ID that extracts key-value pairs and text from uploaded documents using Azure AI Document Intelligence. Supports PDFs, images, and Office files with keyless authentication via DefaultAzureCredential.
